meta.name: Mykonos Concierge Database
meta.purpose: Paradise Estate Members Club concierge intelligence

premium.name: Scorpios
premium.notes: Most iconic. Sunset Ritual is legendary. Lounge vibe best from 5PM.

premium.name: Nammos
premium.notes: Front row sunbeds €300-500. Ralph Lauren, DiCaprio, Mariah Carey regulars.

premium.name: SantAnna
premium.best_for: All-day experience, pool islands, underwater suite
premium.notes: Most luxurious on island. 7 private pool islands with butler service. Underground underwater suite.

premium.name: Jackie O'
premium.notes: Unpretentious luxury. Private kaiki boat for day cruises.

party.name: Cavo Paradiso
party.notes: Walking distance from Paradise Estate (1.5km). Cliff-top open-air dancefloor. Shuttles to/from town.

party.name: Paradise Club
party.notes: #14 best club worldwide (DJMag). Largest nightclub on island.

party.name: Tropicana
party.notes: Most uninhibited party spot. Young, high-energy.

party.name: Kalua
party.notes: 14 years on the spot made famous by 1970s hippies.

chill.name: Alemagou
chill.notes: Away from south coast crowds. Ftelia is windsurfer beach.

chill.name: Hippie Fish
chill.notes: Music plays but doesn't thump. Bus to town nearby.

chill.name: Pasaji
chill.notes: Part of Mykonos Blanc Hotel. Open breakfast through midnight.

chill.name: Principote
chill.notes: Panormos is sheltered when south beaches are windy.

fine_dining.name: Nobu Mykonos
fine_dining.best_for: Black cod miso, omakase, celebrity scene

fine_dining.name: Interni
fine_dining.best_for: Fashion crowd, courtyard dining, late night
fine_dining.notes: Iconic courtyard. Dictates local social hierarchy. Fashion set.

fine_dining.name: Naros
fine_dining.notes: Cuts through Mediterranean tropes with Japanese precision.

fine_dining.name: Krama
fine_dining.notes: Difficult trick of modernizing Greek without losing heart.

authentic_greek.name: Kiki's Tavern
authentic_greek.notes: Local favorite. No phone, no reservations. Cash only. Worth the wait.

authentic_greek.name: Joanna's Nikos Place
authentic_greek.notes: Authentic taverna experience. Locals eat here.

authentic_greek.name: Nikolas Taverna
authentic_greek.notes: Hidden in back streets. Locals' choice.

nightclubs.name: VOID
nightclubs.notes: Expansive architectural compound. 3 levels. Gallery VIP with own bars. Ultramodern flowing design.

nightclubs.name: Guzel
nightclubs.notes: Dominated Mykonian party scene for years. Aegean Sea views. Sunset/sunrise views.

nightclubs.name: Cavo Paradiso
nightclubs.notes: Top club worldwide lists. Walking distance from Paradise Estate.

nightclubs.name: Madon
nightclubs.notes: Affiliated with London's Maddox Club. Sea view balcony. Enchanting dancers.

nightclubs.name: ToyRoom
nightclubs.notes: From London. Custom artworks by Philippe Cardinal. Cozy luxury.

nightclubs.name: Scarpa
nightclubs.notes: Seafront terrace. Windmill views. Best DJs in Greece.

nightclubs.name: Skandinavian Bar
nightclubs.notes: Since 1978. Best meeting point. Cheapest good drinks on island.

hidden_gems.name: Agios Sostis Beach
hidden_gems.description: Completely undeveloped beach. No sunbeds, no music. Just sand and sea. Where locals go to escape. Kiki's Tavern is the only food option (no phone, cash only, queue).

hidden_gems.name: Fokos Beach
hidden_gems.description: Remote north coast. Dirt road access. Taverna with grilled meats. Zero tourists. Raw, wild Mykonos.

hidden_gems.name: Delos Island
hidden_gems.description: Sacred birthplace of Apollo and Artemis. UNESCO World Heritage. 30-min boat from old port. Go at dawn before crowds (our Delos Sunrise Expedition).

hidden_gems.name: Ano Mera Village
hidden_gems.description: The 'other' town. Panagia Tourliani monastery. Authentic plateia (square). Local life away from tourism.

hidden_gems.name: Armenistis Lighthouse
hidden_gems.description: Northwest tip. Dramatic sunset spot. No crowds. Bring wine.

hidden_gems.name: Ftelia Beach
hidden_gems.description: North coast. Windsurfer paradise. Alemagou beach club. Completely different vibe from south coast party beaches.

hidden_gems.name: Rinia Island
hidden_gems.description: Uninhabited island next to Delos. Crystal turquoise water. BBQ on beach. Only accessible by boat.

hidden_gems.name: Petros the Pelican
hidden_gems.description: Island mascot since 1958. Wanders the old port and Matoyianni street. Photo op.

hidden_gems.name: Windmills of Kato Mili
hidden_gems.description: 16th century. Best photographed at sunset from Little Venice side.

hidden_gems.name: Lino's Little Garden
hidden_gems.description: Tiny hidden courtyard restaurant in Mykonos Town back streets. Homemade pasta. Locals only. No sign.

transport.name: Airport VIP Transfer
transport.description: Private car from JMK (7 min to estate)

transport.name: Water Taxi
transport.notes: Cash only. Best way to navigate south coast.

transport.name: Car/ATV Rental
transport.notes: Essential for Casa di Luna guests. Book early in peak.

transport.name: Private Driver (Full Day)
transport.notes: Essential for groups. Knows every back road.

transport.name: Speedboat Transfer
transport.description: Port to estate dock or beach hopping
transport.notes: Fastest way from port. Avoids traffic entirely.

transport.name: Private Jet Coordination
transport.notes: Coordinate with FBO. Helipad pickup on landing.

yacht.name: Multi-Day Yacht
yacht.notes: Mykonos → Paros → Naxos → Santorini routes available.

yacht.name: Fishing Charter
yacht.description: Traditional caïque. Fresh catch BBQ on Rhinia.
yacht.notes: Authentic experience. Captain cooks your catch.

wellness.name: Personal Training
wellness.description: Estate gym or outdoor. HIIT, strength, boxing.

wellness.name: Reiki + Energy Work
wellness.description: Private session in villa or garden

dining.name: Private Chef (Greek)
dining.notes: Farm-to-table. Sources from local fishermen and farms.

dining.name: Restaurant Reservations
dining.description: Priority bookings at all top venues
dining.notes: Scorpios, Nobu, COYA, Nammos, Interni — we handle it.

dining.name: Sommelier Service
dining.description: Wine selection, cellar curation, tasting events

dining.name: BBQ/Grill Master
dining.description: Poolside or garden BBQ with premium meats/seafood

dining.name: Breakfast Chef (Daily)
dining.description: Fresh daily breakfast service at villa

entertainment.name: DJ Booking (International)
entertainment.notes: Book 6+ weeks ahead in peak season.

entertainment.name: Lighting & Production
entertainment.description: LED, lasers, stage lighting for events

shopping_fashion.name: Personal Shopper
shopping_fashion.description: Guided shopping in Mykonos Town boutiques

shopping_fashion.name: In-Villa Styling
shopping_fashion.description: Stylist brings curated selection to estate

shopping_fashion.name: Jewelry Private Viewing
shopping_fashion.description: Local designers bring collections to villa

special_occasions.name: Proposal Setup
special_occasions.description: Helipad or amphitheatre. Flowers, champagne, photographer.

special_occasions.name: Birthday Celebration
special_occasions.description: Full event coordination. Cake, decor, entertainment.

special_occasions.name: Anniversary Dinner
special_occasions.description: Private chef + flowers + musician on helipad

special_occasions.name: Welcome Package
special_occasions.description: Champagne, flowers, local delicacies, personalized note

adventure_sports.name: Paddleboard/Kayak
adventure_sports.description: SUP and kayak at Super Paradise

business_corporate.name: Meeting Setup
business_corporate.description: Amphitheatre as outdoor boardroom. AV, WiFi, catering.

business_corporate.name: Team Building
business_corporate.description: Cooking class, boat trip, wellness, competitions

security.name: Pentagon Group
security.service: Night security + event security + VIP close protection

yoga.name: Shri Gaia Institute
yoga.service: Multi-day retreats, sound healing at Delos

concierge.name: Kinglike Concierge
concierge.service: Luxury concierge, yacht, helicopter, VIP tables

practical.taxi_tips: Notoriously hard to find. Use club shuttles. Book private transfers. Water taxi for south coast.
practical.wind: Meltemi winds July-August. North beaches (Ftelia, Panormos) get hit. South beaches (Ornos, Platis Gialos) more sheltered.
practical.peak_warning: August = shoulder-to-shoulder. June and September are the sweet spots.
practical.dress_code: Day: high-end swimwear + linen. Night: smart casual. Cobbled streets = no stilettos.
practical.prices: Front row sunbeds €50-500. Cocktails €15-25. Bottle service €500-2000+. Water €10 at beach clubs.
practical.minimum_spend: Top clubs require minimum spend on top of sunbed rental. Always confirm what's included.
